stemHtml: What is an example of an external error caused due to economical reasons?

options.a: Distractions from the cabin crew which lead to the pilots missing an ATC clearance.
options.b: Pilots accepting a shorter ATC clearance to save fuel. Upon arrival, they realise that they are coming in too high and unstable on the approach.
options.c: Pilots missing a checklist’s item during pre-flight preparation.
